nodes.name: PluginRegistryLoader
nodes.description: Load marketplace plugin registry via fabric abstraction. Validate plugin signatures.

nodes.name: PluginCapabilityValidator
nodes.description: Validate plugin capabilities against available fabric interfaces. Check feature flags (FT-XXX).

nodes.name: PluginDependencyResolver
nodes.description: Resolve plugin dependencies and load order. Detect circular dependencies.

nodes.name: PluginSandboxConfigurator
nodes.description: Configure sandbox permissions for plugin execution. Apply security policies.

nodes.name: PluginMarketplaceIntegrator
nodes.description: Integrate plugin with marketplace visibility rules (public/private). Link to FREEDOM config.

nodes.name: PluginHealthMonitor
nodes.description: Monitor plugin health, error rates, and performance. Record metrics to xiigen-plugin-metrics.

nodes.name: PluginReadinessGate
nodes.description: Validate plugin registration complete and healthy. Emit PluginReadyForDeployment.

nodes.name: OutboxPublisher
nodes.description: Emit CloudEvents to queue fabric after all storage (DNA-8 outbox pattern).
